name: initial_coze_task_lifecycle_sequence
description: Recommended endpoint order for a future Coze integration.

sequence.purpose: Create a backend task and receive task_id.
Register metadata and count matrix inputs with safe relative paths.
Run minimal_cpm_log2fc or request DESeq2 after preflight readiness.
Fetch a Coze-safe structured summary before presenting results.
Download known task-scoped artifacts through relative API paths.

supporting_endpoints.purpose: List known task artifacts before download.
Check whether DESeq2 runtime requirements are ready before requesting DESeq2.
